params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, linear brass pendant — matte brass finish, slim rectangular profile, warm 2200K light, suspended 30 inches above island, matte black stone kitchen counter — honed black finish (consistent with coffee table material), sightline-visible living objects: low-profile 3-seater sofa — charcoal slate linen upholstery (#2F2F2F), large neutral woven rug — warm pebble wool, round low coffee table — honed black marble (Jet Black #0B0B0B) with beveled edge, solid cylindrical base. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A restrained, textural Japandi‑inspired interior that balances deep, matte dark surfaces with warm natural wood and minimal, sculptural accents. The mood is calm and intimate: low ambient illumination, focused warm accent lights, and deliberately curated negative space. Materials read tactile and honest — smoked oak, matte black stone, warm brass — with a limited warm‑neutral palette to keep visual cohesion across connected spaces. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
